title: Quick adjust mask and method for using the same
abstract: An apparatus for supplying a patient with oxygen in emergency and/or in conjunction with CPAP devices. The apparatus includes a face mask connected to a number of quick pull adjustment devices that adjust the top and bottom of the face mask, respectively. After being slid over the head of a patient, a paramedic or other user pulls a top strap followed by a bottom strap. No further adjustment is needed in order to form a tight and secure fit on the patient between the face mask and the nose and mouth region of the patient's face. During use, a CPAP inlet or tubing, resuscitation bag, or other means for delivering oxygen is connected to an inlet of the face mask. The face mask is removed from the patient by manipulating each of the quick pull adjustment devices and then pulling the top strap and bottom strap there through.
claims:
Claims I claim: 1. An aparatus for quickly securing a face mask to the face of a patient, the device comprising: a face mask; an adjustable first strap removably coupled to the face mask; and an adjustable second strap removably coupled to the face mask, wherein the adjustable first and second straps each comprise tightening means for bringing the face mask against the face of the patient and locking it into position when at least one free end of either the adjustable first or the second strap is pulled in a direction away from the face mask. 2. The apparatus of claim 1 wherein the tightening means of the adjustable first strap comprises at least two opposing ends of the first adjustable strap threaded through a corresponding strap adjuster. 3. The apparatus of claim 2 further comprising a removable loop coupled to the face mask and disposed through at least one of the strap adjusters. 4. The apparatus of claim 1 wherein the tightening means of the adjustable second strap comprises at least two opposing ends of the second adjustable strap threaded through a corresponding adjustment hook. 5. The apparatus of claim 4 wherein each adjustment hook comprises a hook configured to couple to an aperture disposed on the face mask. 6. The device of claim 1 further comprising an adjustable forehead pad. 7. An apparatus for quickly applying a face mask to a patient comprising: a face mask; and an adjustable harness removably coupled to the face mask, wherein the harness comprises tightening means for bringing the face mask against the face of the patient and locking it into position when a portion of the harness is pulled in a direction away from the face mask. 8. A method for quickly securing a face mask to the face of a patient comprising: disposing a face mask over the face of the patient while simultaneously disposing a harness removably coupled to the face mask over the back of the patientâs head; and pulling at least one free end of a strap of the harness in a direction away from the face mask, wherein the face mask is brought against the face of the patient without any further physical manipulation after the at least one free end of the strap has been pulled. 9. The method of claim 8 wherein pulling at least one free end of a strap of the 

 harness in a direction away from the face mask comprises: pulling at least one free end of an upper strap of the harness in a direction away from the face mask; or pulling at least one free end of a lower strap of the harness in a direction away from the face mask. 10. The method of claim 8 wherein pulling at least one free end of a strap of the harness in a direction away from the face mask comprises pulling at least two free ends of the strap of the harness in two opposing directions, wherein each opposing direction is orientated away from the face mask. 11. The method of claim 8 wherein pulling at least one free end of the strap of the harness in a direction away from the face mask comprises tightening a forehead pad against the forehead of the patient. 12. The method of claim 8 further comprising coupling the strap of the harness to the face mask. 13. The method of claim 12 wherein coupling the strap of the harness to the face mask comprises coupling an adjustment hook to the face mask, wherein the strap is threaded through the adjustment hook. 14. The method of claim 9 wherein pulling at least one free end of the upper strap of 

 the harness in a direction away from the face mask comprises pulling the at least one free end of the strap through a strap adjuster coupled to the face mask. 15. The method of claim 9 wherein pulling at least one free end of the lower strap of the harness in a direction away from the face mask comprises pulling the at least one free end of the strap through an adjustment hook coupled to the face mask. 16. The method of claim 8 further comprising: manipulating a tightening means accommodating the strap of the harness; pulling the strap of the harness to bring the at least one free end of the strap closer to the tightening means; and removing the face mask and the harness from patientâs face and head, respectively. 17. The method of claim 16 further comprising uncoupling the strap of the harness from the face mask. 18. The method of claim 8 further comprising coupling an oxygen delivering means to an inlet port defined in the face mask. 19. The method of claim 8 further comprising adjusting a position of a forehead pad relative to the face mask. 20. The method of claim 12 wherein coupling the strap of the harness to the face mask comprises coupling a detachable loop to a portion of the face mask and then coupling a tightening means to the detachable loop, wherein the tightening means accommodate the strap of the harness.
